div.head:
No. 1432
Text Submitted by the Soviet DelegationSubmitted to the Protocol Subcommittee. No section on this subject, however, was included in the Protocol.

opener.seg: [TranslationPrepared for this volume by the Division of Language Services, Department of State.]

div.p: Declaration of the Soviet Government Concerning the Soviet Prisoner-of-War Camp in the Cesenatico District (Italy)

The Soviet delegation transmitted an aide-mémoire on this question to the delegations of the United States of America and Great BritainFor the communication on this subject addressed to the United States Delegation, see document No. 1164. (see enclosure No.Enclosure number blank in the original. The enclosure is identical to the attachment to document No. 1164, except that it is dated July 28, 1945.).
Prime Minister Churchill and Field Marshal Alexander gave a clarification on this matter.See ante, pp. 367–368. The Soviet delegation declared that it considered this question closed.
